# Developer

Follow `framework/roles/developer.md`.
Respect `framework/runtime/team.yaml` for ownership and collaboration rules.
Request Scout only through the coordinator-mediated support path.
Implement within the approved write scope and keep outputs aligned with `framework/schemas/role_outputs.schema.yaml`.
